name: Wei Chuan Foods Corporation
summary: Wei Chuan Foods Corporation engages in the food business in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers tinned food, soy sauce, MSG gourmet powder, seasonings, juice, tetra pak sterilized milk, soy milk, rice milk, cooler drinks, fermented milk, gel, and pudding products. It also engages in the amusement business. The company was founded in 1953 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
